purpose: operationalize atomic keeper deduplication into future naming and signal-intake governance

core_rules.title: canonical_naming_structure
core_rules.requirement: new atomic signal names must follow domain_mechanism_window_raw

core_rules.title: mechanism_family_assignment
core_rules.requirement: every new signal must declare its canonical mechanism family and whether it is a new_mechanism, horizon_variant, direction_variant, or naming_alias

core_rules.title: mandatory_alias_check
core_rules.requirement: no new candidate may be preregistered before alias, direction-variant, and horizon-variant checks are explicitly answered

core_rules.title: canonical_name_precedence
core_rules.requirement: when a canonical label already exists, future work must use that canonical label instead of a near-equivalent alias

core_rules.title: single_signal_positive_is_not_direct_promotion
core_rules.requirement: signal_edge_positive is only an intake pass and does not justify direct family or overlay promotion

core_rules.title: historical_positive_can_be_retired
core_rules.requirement: a signal may remain historically positive while being removed from the active keeper pool if later family-level evidence turns against it

core_rules.title: prereg_must_include_dedup_note
core_rules.requirement: every future discovery prereg must include nearest canonical signal, relationship type, and why it deserves independent budget

core_rules.title: family_rounds_use_canonical_signals_only
core_rules.requirement: future family rounds may use canonical fields only and must not mix canonical signals with their aliases or inverse duplicates

core_rules.title: watchlist_is_not_auto_promotion
core_rules.requirement: watchlist keeper means retained for observation, not automatically promotable

core_rules.title: exploration_budget_prefers_orthogonal_mechanisms
core_rules.requirement: future atomic discovery should prioritize genuinely orthogonal mechanisms over more labels inside existing clusters

core_rules.title: composability_head_stability_hard_gate
core_rules.requirement: before family-promotion, screen_avg_top10_overlap_next_day must not be lower than reference_avg_top10_overlap_next_day by more than 0.10

core_rules.title: alpha158_paper_whitelist_only_source_policy
core_rules.requirement: for next round and onwards, single-signal discovery intake must run in alpha158_paper_whitelist_only mode and every candidate must provide source provenance from the approved whitelist categories
